description.value: Allied Surgical Emporium is a trusted surgical supply store in Lucknow, providing a comprehensive range of essential medical equipment and solutions. They specialize in high-quality products including Cautery Machines, OT Lights, Portable Fumigation and SS Fogger Machines, SoClean Biomedical Waste Solutions, and Surgical Sutures, serving the needs of healthcare facilities.

address.value: Allied Surgical Emporium, Opposite Daya Nidhan Park, Lalbagh, Lucknow, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, 226001
